title: vitis pentagona
intro: Vitis pentagona, also known as the white grape or five-angled grapevine, is a species of grapevine native to the Himalayas and China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vitis pentagona include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against cardiovascular disease. The herbal preparations of Vitis pentagona include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, wines, and other medicinal products.
